data.title: Easterly Gov't Properties reports 2025 distribution tax details for shareholders; consult Form 1099-DIV for info.
data.description: Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA), a real estate investment trust specializing in Class A commercial properties leased to the U.S. Government and partners, disclosed the tax details of its 2025 common stock distributions. Shareholders will receive Form 1099-DIV for tax reporting. Consultation with personal tax advisors is advised.

data.title: EigenAI debuts Bit-Exact Deterministic AI Inference on Mainnet, ensuring 100% reproducible LLM outputs on GPUs with <2% overhead.
data.description: EigenAI has successfully achieved a remarkable milestone by achieving 100% reproducible outputs of Large Language Models (LLMs) on GPUs with less than 2% overhead. This significant achievement now allows for the development of verifiable autonomous AI agents for trading and prediction markets. By ensuring the reproducibility of LLM outputs, EigenAI has paved the way for more reliable and trustworthy AI applications in these sectors.

data.title: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund's 2025 annual report now available online. To request hard copy call 877-657-3863.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (NYSE: KYN) disclosed that its annual report for the fiscal year concluding on November 30, 2025, can be accessed on the company's website, www.kaynefunds.com. For those interested in receiving a physical copy of the report at no cost, they can request it by contacting 877-657-3863 or via email at cef@kayneanderson.com.

data.title: RAB Capital Holdings sold 6,278,500 Common Shares of Black Iron Inc. for $859,514 in the open market at $0.1373 per share.
data.description: In Brentwood, United Kingdom, as of January 23, 2026, RAB Capital Holdings Limited, Eagles Trust Limited, and RAB Special Situations (Master) Fund Limited, privately owned by Mr. William Philip Richards, collectively known as the Reporter, disclosed the sale of 6,278,500 Common Shares of Black Iron Inc. (BKI:TSX). This disposal occurred between May 15, 2025, and January 22, 2026, in the open market, netting an aggregate amount of $859,514. The shares were sold at an average price of $0.1373 per common share.

data.title: NewtekOne exchanged $7,877,200 of 5.50% Notes for 8.50% Fixed Rate Senior Notes due 2031 in offer, waiving minimum condition.
data.description: NewtekOne, Inc. announced the expiration of its offer to exchange any and all of its 5.50% Notes due 2026 for newly issued 8.50% Fixed Rate Senior Notes due 2031. The offer expired on January 23, 2026, with $7,877,200 in aggregate principal amount of Old Notes tendered representing around 8.29% of the $95.0 million outstanding principal amount. NewtekOne waived the condition of at least 10% of the Old Notes being tendered, accepting all notes that were validly tendered before the Expiration Date.

data.title: Alert: Winter storm approaching U.S., use propane for heating but prioritize safety. Winter Storm Fern may cause blackouts.
data.description: Phoenix will soon face a severe winter storm that will bring dangerous ice and snow levels across the U.S., causing residents to rely on propane as a main or alternate heating and energy source. Propane becomes a reliable option when other energy sources are scarce. It is crucial to prioritize safety when using propane heaters or generators indoors during this time. Winter Storm Fern could result in rolling blackouts in Texas and neighboring areas, emphasizing the importance of being cautious while using propane in such weather conditions.

data.title: Anthropic unveils AI framework for devs, showing 3-10x token costs when multi-agent systems excel over single agents in three cases.
data.description: Anthropic has identified the circumstances in which multi-agent systems surpass single AI agents, indicating a token cost increase of between 3 to 10 times. The study highlights three particular use cases where this additional expense is justified by the enhanced performance.

data.title: Former Chelsea Manager Avram Grant named Head of Football Operations at Solmate, a Solana infrastructure company, focused on Abu Dhabi. Grant will oversee sports operations to improve operating efficiency.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, the Solana infrastructure company, Solmate (Brera Holdings PLC, NASDAQ: SLMT), has appointed Avram Grant as Head of Football Operations. Grant, an experienced advisor, will manage Solmate's sports operations in Abu Dhabi. This move aims to enhance operating efficiency and streamline processes within the company. He will be taking over responsibilities from Dan J. McClory and Alber in this role. Grant's appointment symbolizes Solmate's strategic approach towards optimizing its operations.

data.description: This news information is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination in the United States. This applies to all press release services specific to the United States.

data.title: Aldabra 4 Liquidity Opportunity Vehicle, Inc. closes $300.15M IPO for potential merger or acquisition matchups.
data.description: A blank check company named Aldabra 4 Liquidity Opportunity Vehicle, Inc. based in Miami and established on January 23, 2026, seeks to merge with another business entity. The Company is formed specifically for this purpose and aims to engage in a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination. The focus is on joining forces with a suitable partner for mutual growth and development, with no specific industry mentioned for the potential merger.

data.title: PAXG's market cap hits $2B with demand rising by 450%, reaching $4,997. Paxos explains gold tokenization process for traders.
data.description: Paxos recently explained the process of converting physical gold into PAXG tokens, a gold-backed cryptocurrency that has surged to $4,997 in value due to increasing demand for safe haven assets. Traders should be aware of this development as it provides insight into the mechanism behind the token's valuation.

data.title: Inspirit Equity buys majority of Sizemore, Inc., boosting growth & services. Los Angeles, Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: In a move set to drive rapid growth and enhance service offerings, Inspirit Equity revealed on January 23, 2026, its acquisition of a majority stake in Sizemore, Inc. The company is a prominent player in outsourced facility management services, catering to a wide range of clients. This strategic partnership marks a significant step for both firms and is poised to bolster Sizemore's reach and capabilities in the industry.

data.title: Foresea Holding S.A. seeks consents from holders of 7.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2030. Luxemburg based. Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: Luxembourg, Jan. 23, 2026 - Foresea Holding S.A. revealed its plan to seek consents from holders of its 7.50% Senior Secured Notes set to mature in 2030. This initiative, known as the "Consent Solicitation," aims to secure approvals from investors. The Company is actively engaging with Holders to gather the necessary Consents required for the process. The 7.50% Senior Secured Notes due 2030 are a significant part of Foresea's financial portfolio, reflecting its strategic approach to funding.

data.title: PROCOMER takes Costa Rica's biggest business delegation to MD&M West 2026 to connect talent, innovation, and biz opps in the medical devices sector. Feb 3-5.
data.description: Costa Rica aims to foster collaboration between talent, innovation, and business prospects within the medical devices industry. As of January 23, 2026, SAN JOSÉ, the country's Trade & Investment Promotion Agency, PROCOMER, will host a networking event from February 3 to 5. The event represents an opportunity for stakeholders to engage with Costa Rica's thriving sector and explore potential partnerships.

data.title: Oak Valley Bancorp reported Q4 2025 net income of $6,335,000 and FY2025 net income of $23,913,000, with an EPS of $0.76 and $2.88 respectively.
data.description: Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY) based in Oakdale, California, recently released its unaudited consolidated financial results. For the three months ending December 31, 2025, the company reported a consolidated net income of $6,335,000, translating to $0.76 per diluted share (EPS). This demonstrates a slight decline compared to the previous quarter's $6,693,000 income, equivalent to $0.81 EPS, and a modest increase from the $6,008,000 income, or $0.73 EPS, during the same period the previous year. Looking at the annual numbers for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, the consolidated net income totaled $23,913,000, or $2.88 EPS. This marks a 4.1% decrease from the $24,948,000 income, or $3.02 EPS, for the year 2024. The decline in quarterly earnings compared to the prior quarter was influenced by a provision for credit losses of $865,000 incurred during the quarter. This provision was related to a collateral-dependent loan that was classified as non-accrual at the end of the year. On the other hand, the increase in quarterly figures compared to the same period in the previous year was primarily due to a growth of $95.3 million in earning assets and the subsequent expansion of net interest income.

data.title: AltaPointe Health in Mobile, Alabama launches weekly online Veteran Peer Support Group to aid veterans in transitioning to civilian life.
data.description: In Mobile, Alabama, on January 23, 2026, AltaPointe Health announced the introduction of a new online Veteran Peer Support Group to aid veterans in adjusting from military to civilian life. The group will convene weekly on a virtual platform, ensuring a safe and confidential space for participants. This initiative aims to provide crucial support during this transition period, offering veterans a supportive community to navigate this change.

data.title: Mueller Water Products to release Q1 2026 earnings on Feb 4, with conference call on Feb 5 at 11am ET.	webcast available.
data.description: Mueller Water Products, Inc. (NYSE: MWA) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter ending December 31, 2025, after the U.S. markets close on February 4, 2026. The following day, February 5, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET, the Company will host a conference call to review earnings and business performance. Interested individuals can tune in to the webcast on the Investor Relations page of the Company’s official website at www.muellerwaterproducts.com. A recording of the webcast will be accessible for about 90 days post the call.
Century Next Financial Corp had strong year-end results in 2025, with impressive numbers.

data.title: Plaid Tech collaborates with Graphene Nanoworks to assess graphene water-shedding coatings, films, and membranes for glass and metal.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 23, 2026, Plaid Technologies Inc. revealed a notable partnership with Graphene Nanoworks Ltd. This collaboration aims to evaluate the viability and technical capabilities of advanced graphene-centric water-shedding coatings, films, and membranes for use in glass and metal scenarios. The company trades under the tickers CSE: STIF, OTC: STIFF, and FRA: 5QX0.
